info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: Bedane ca ' iti DAtukAvyavyAKyA  ' hantyarTAcca ' (ga.sU.) - navagaRyAm uktAH api hantyarTAH svArTe RicaM laBante ityarTaH ' - kOmudI  ' hana hiMsAgatyoriti hanaDAtoH hiMsA gamanaM ca arTaH  etadarTakAH ye DAtavaH BvAdizu navasu gaRezu paWitAH te sarve curAdO paWitA: pratyetavyAH ityarTaH  tataSca teByaH svArTe Rijapi pakze Bavati iti Palitam " - bAlamanoramA  ' GAwayed GaRwayed saNGaBAzayo: Gawate mitaH ' (Slo. 70) iti devaH
